title: Compact repository comparison layout
summary: Repository comparison now uses compact endpoint selects, quick range presets, a selected-snapshot strip, and a structured comparison board that reduces page-level scrolling.
userVisibleChange: Users can choose comparison ranges with selects or quick presets and review product changes, evidence, validation, and timeline entries in a compact board instead of scrolling through a long report.

risks.title: Dense panels use internal scrolling for long evidence and validation lists, so very large ranges may still need filtering later.

decisions.title: Use explicit endpoint selects plus quick range presets so users do not have to scroll a long timeline to choose snapshots.
Group comparison output into change columns, compact evidence panels, and a horizontal timeline to keep the primary differences visible sooner.

validation.command: Playwright verified /repositories/eve Compare tab default range and Last 5 preset render the compact selector and structured comparison board.
